title: COMMUNITY CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: DALLAS EVANGELICAL CHURCH COMMUNITY CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, towels and linens. Donations accepted. 783 SW Church Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9am-noon, Thursday 7pm-9pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-noon, as long as approved volunteer leaders are available Email (503) 623-3778 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Clothing Closet Ministry Director (503) 623-3778 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Walk in, call, or visit website for more information -Donations accepted during the Community Clothing Closet hours or in the white bin on the Mill Street side of the church FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Polk County Services: Baby Clothing Bedding/Linen Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DALLAS EVANGELICAL CHURCH
